tacos-de-pobre.name: Tacos De Pobre

ingredients.item: Chile sauce or salsa of your choice

instructions: Heat enough oil for shallow-frying in a frying pan or skillet and sauté the potato peelings. When they are almost golden, add the onion and chile and sauté until the onion is translucent. Season with salt to taste. Spoon onto a plate lined with paper towels, to absorb excess oil.
Heat the tortillas and serve as tacos with the potato peeling filling, with chile sauce or salsa on the side.

tahini-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Tahini-chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Cream butter, brown sugar, and white sugar in a bowl until fluffy. Beat in tahini. Add eggs and vanilla extract and continue to beat an additional 3 to 5 minutes.

Mix flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl. Add flour mixture to butter mixture and beat until just combined. Add chocolate chips and nuts. Cover and refrigerate dough overnight.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Scoop out cookies into 1-inch balls using a cookie scoop and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges start to brown lightly, 12 to 15 minutes.

tangerine-macarons-lezzet.name: Tangerine Macarons
instructions: 1. Mix the powder sugar in a bowl of powder almond and ratchet.
2. Cook eggs in a separate bowl with the help of mixer until they are hardened.
3. Slowly add dust sugar and continue to whip.
4. Add and mix food paint.
5. With the help of a spoon, gradually add to the almond mixture.
6. Fill the mixture into the clamping bag.
7. Oil paper cool on the oven tray.
8. Draw rounds with 3 cm diameter with lead pen leaving space on them.
9. Tighten these rounds that fill in the clamping bag.
10. Pre-heated 150 degree cook in oven for 15-20 minutes.
11. 11. Wrap the powder sugar, butter, ratchet and tangerine juice from a mixer to a smooth consistency area.
12. Fill the fill in one clamping bag.
12. August Tighten the straight sides of the makarons you extract from the oven from the padlock.
14 July Close and serve with other parts.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

tart-cherry-cobbler.name: Tart Cherry Cobbler

ingredients.item: Tart pitted cherries packed in water

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

In a large bowl, gently stir the cherries, brown sugar, and white sugar until all the sugar has dissolved. Mix in the tapioca, almond extract, cinnamon, and salt. Let stand 15 minutes. Pour into a 9x13 inch baking dish, and dot with butter.
Roll our pie pastry into a rectangle slightly larger than the baking dish, and place over the cherries. Tuck in corners, and make several slits in the dough. Brush with milk.
Bake 45 minutes in the preheated oven, until crust is lightly browned and filling is bubbly. Cool 1 hour before serving.

tex-mex-turkey-soup.name: Tex-mex Turkey Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion; cook until begins to soften, about 4 minutes. Add garlic, chili powder, cumin and oregano; cook, stirring, for 1 minute.

Stir in water, turkey, diced tomatoes, tomato soup, salsa, bouillon cubes, and parsley. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, and simmer until bouillon cubes dissolve, 5 minutes. Stir in corn, black beans, 1/2 cup sour cream, and 1/4 cup cilantro; simmer 20 to 30 minutes.
Serve soup with crushed tortilla chips, cheese, green onion, 1/2 cup cilantro, and 1/2 cup sour cream.

thai-chicken-stock.name: Thai Chicken Stock
instructions: Place chicken carcass into a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes. Drain, rinse carcass under running water, and return to the pot.

Add galangal, lemongrass, lime leaves, shallot, garlic, and chiles. Pour in 10 cups water. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer uncovered for 1 1/2 hours, skimming the foam and fat often.
Strain stock through cheesecloth before using.

thai-mussel-pineapple-curry.name: Thai Mussel-pineapple Curry

ingredients.prep: green all over with absolutely no yellow
soaked in hot water until softened, squeezed dry, and ground into fine, cottony flakes
or  0.5 cup canned coconut cream plus 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin coconut oil
lightly bruised and torn into small pieces

instructions: Peel and core the pineapple, then cut the flesh into 1-inch cubes. Measure out 5 cups to use; save the rest for another use.

Put the curry paste, shrimp, and coconut cream in a 4-quart saucepan and set over medium-high heat. Stir-fry until the paste is fragrant and the coconut fat separates, about 1 minute. Add the pineapple cubes, coconut milk, and fish sauce, then bring to a boil, lower the heat to a gentle simmer, cover, and cook for 5 minutes.

By this time the pineapple will have released some of its juice and will have softened somewhat. Since it is impossible to know exactly how sour, sweet, or bland the pineapple is, taste the sauce along with a piece of pineapple to get a good idea of how the end result will be. Add the sugar, tamarind, and more fish sauce as needed to achieve a sauce that is primarily sweet and sour with salty trailing closely behind. Stir in the mussels (discard any that fail to close to the touch), add lime leaves, re-cover, and cook until all of the mussels have opened, 5 to 10 minutes, depending on their size. Remove from the heat and discard any mussels that failed to open. Transfer to a serving dish and serve with rice.

thanksgiving-turkey-french-dip.name: Thanksgiving Turkey French Dip
instructions: Make the cranberry mustard sauce: In a small bowl, mix together the cranberry sauce and mustard.

Make the gravy au jus: In a small saucepan, whisk together the gravy and chicken stock over medium heat until gently simmering. Season with black pepper as needed. Remove from the heat and divide between 2 small bowls for dipping.
Turn the broiler on high.

Place the bottom of each French roll, cut-side up, on a baking sheet. Spread about 2 tablespoons of cranberry mustard sauce on each half, then layer on the sliced turkey. Top with the Swiss cheese. Broil for 30 seconds.
Remove the pan from the oven and add the top buns, cut-side up. Broil for another 30 seconds, until the top buns are golden brown and the cheese is melted and lightly bubbling.
Place the top buns on top of the melted cheese and transfer to plates with the au jus alongside for dipping. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

the-ba-patty-melt.name: The Ba Patty Melt
instructions: Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium heat and cook onions, stirring often and adding water as needed to prevent burning, until deep golden brown and very soft, 20–25 minutes. Set aside.

Gently mix onion, beef, ketchup, garlic powder, salt, and pepper, in a medium bowl. Divide into 4 portions and press each between 2 pieces of parchment or waxed paper until about ¼” thick (you want them roughly the same dimensions as the bread you're using.)

Heat oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat. Working in 2 batches, cook patties, pressing gently, until browned but still pink in the center, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate.

Wipe out skillet and reduce heat to medium. Top 4 slices of bread with cheddar, then beef patties, caramelized onions, and Swiss cheese. Close up sandwiches and spread each top with 1 tsp. mayonnaise. Place in pan, mayonnaise side down, and weight with a foil-covered heavy pan. Cook until bottom slice is golden brown, about 3 minutes. Remove weighted pan and spread the top of each sandwich with 1 tsp. mayonnaise. Flip and weight again. Cook until other side is golden brown and cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Patties can be formed 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

the-denver-omelet.name: The Denver Omelet

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Beat eggs in a small bowl until just combined; do not overbeat.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add ham, onion, and bell pepper; season with salt and pepper. Cook and stir until onions soften and ham begins to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium-low and pour in eggs. Mix briefly with a spatula while shaking the pan to ensure ingredients are evenly distributed.
Quickly run the spatula along edges of omelet.
Sprinkle Cheddar cheese and cayenne pepper over omelet.
Cook, shaking the pan occasionally, until top is still wet but not runny, about 5 minutes. Use a spatula to fold omelet in half and transfer it to a plate.

the-munroe-melt.name: The Munroe Melt
instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Place roll on the prepared baking sheet, cut-sides-up. Spread Dijonnaise on 1 roll half; top with turkey, Swiss cheese, and ham.
Spread 1 tablespoon mayonnaise on other roll half; top with roast beef, tomato, and Muenster cheese.
Broil sandwich, open-faced, until cheeses melt and begin to bubble and ham begins to crisp around the edges. Put both halves together to serve.

the-original-schnitzelwich.name: The Original Schnitzelwich

ingredients.item: Ciabatta rolls or other crusty rolls

instructions: Whisk 2 tablespoons oil, sour cream, and horseradish in small bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and sauté until beginning to soften and brown, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook until onions are very soft and deep golden brown, stirring often, about 20 minutes. Transfer to bowl. DO AHEAD Horseradish sauce and caramelized onion can be made 1 day ahead. Cover separately and chill.

Place rack on rimmed baking sheet. Place pork between 2 sheets of plastic wrap, spacing apart. Using flat side of meat tenderizer or mallet, pound to thickness of 1/4 inch. Place flour in 1 shallow bowl. Beat eggs in another shallow bowl. Place panko in third shallow bowl. Sprinkle pork with salt and pepper. Working with 1 pork chop at a time, dredge both sides in flour, shaking off excess; dip in eggs to coat. Transfer to panko and press to coat pork all over. Place on prepared rack. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork to skillet and cook until golden brown and cooked through, about 3 minutes per side, adding more oil by tablespoonfuls if needed. Transfer pork to paper towels.

Spoon 1 1/2 tablespoons ajvar onto each roll bottom; top each with 2 tablespoons caramelized onion. Place pork atop onion, then top with lettuce. Spoon 1 rounded tablespoon horseradish sauce onto cut side of each roll top. Place roll tops on sandwiches and serve.

the-palak-paneer.name: The Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch the spinach in salted, boiling water for one minute, then drain and transfer to a bowl with cold water.
Once cooled, puree in a blender until smooth and remove.
Heat some salted water and once it comes to a boil, switch off the gas and add the cubed paneer. Let it soak in the water till the time to be added to the gravy.
Add all the ingredients of the gravy base to a blender and mix until smooth.
Add the butter to a hot pan with some oil (optional) to stop it from burning. Once foaming, add the cashews, cumin seeds, finely chopped garlic, and bay leaves. Fry for a minute till aromatic.

Add the blended gravy, along with all the powders and stir well. Simmer on low heat for 15 minutes till you see oil seeping from the sides. The onion-tomato gravy must smell fragrant by this point without any raw smell.
Add the spinach puree and stir well to combine along with salt. Simmer on low heat for another 15 minutes until the rawness of the puree goes away and there is an intense gravy left.
Add the cream and water as required to make it velvety along with the drained paneer cubes and fenugreek leaves. Simmer on low heat for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with coriander leaves, sliced ginger, and a dollop of cream.
Enjoy with naan bread or fluffy rice!

the-world-of-rice-salads.name: The World Of Rice Salads

ingredients.item: Or 1/2 large red or yellow bell pepper

ingredients.prep: made with extra virgin olive oil and red wine vinegar, plus more as needed

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Put the rice and all the vegetables in a large bowl. Drizzle with vinaigrette and use two big forks to combine, fluffing the rice and tossing gently to separate the grains.

Stir in the parsley, taste, and adjust the seasoning or moisten with a little more dressing. Serve at room temperature or refrigerate for up to a day, bringing the salad back to room temperature before serving.

Rice Salad, Japanese Style: Use brown or white short-grain rice. Halve the amount of celery and carrot and finely chop them or shred them on a grater. Add 1 cup cubed firm tofu (preferably baked). Instead of the vinaigrette, toss with 1/4 cup or so of Simple Miso Dipping Sauce (made by whisking together 6 tablespoons miso paste, 3/4 cup warm water or sake, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1 tablespoon mirin or honey, 1 tablespoon rice vinegar plus more to taste, and salt to taste). Instead of the parsley, crumble 2 sheets of nori over the rice salad and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons black or white sesame seeds.

Rice Salad, Mexican Style: Long-grain or medium-grain, white or brown, all work well here. When blending the vinaigrette, add 1 tablespoon chili powder and 2 tablespoons Mexican crema or mayonnaise. Instead of celery and carrot, add 1 cup chopped fresh tomato. Substitute chopped fresh cilantro for the parsley and, at the same time, add 2 chopped hard-cooked eggs and chopped jalapeño chiles if you like. Serve with lime wedges.

Rice Salad, Indian Style: Use brown or white basmati rice. When making the vinaigrette, use rice wine vinegar, replace the oil with coconut milk, and add 1 tablespoon curry powder, or more to taste. Instead of the bell pepper, celery, and carrot, add 1/2 cup each cubed cooked potato, cooked cauliflower florets, and green peas (cooked frozen are fine). Substitute cilantro for the parsley.

Citrus Rice Salad: Use any rice. Instead of red wine vinegar, make the vinaigrette with freshly squeezed citrus juice—choose from lemon, lime, orange, blood orange, tangerine, pink grapefruit, or a combination. Whatever you use, add 2 tablespoons of the grated zest and 1 tablespoon of sugar or honey to the blender. Do not include the scallion or the vegetables. (You might want to use a little less dressing.) Instead of the parsley, use mint if you like. A handful of chopped almonds or pecans make a nice addition.

Tomato Rice Salad: Use any kind of brown or white rice. When making the vinaigrette, eliminate the vinegar and add 1 medium tomato to the blender. Instead of the scallion and other vegetables, add 2 cups chopped fresh tomato (a mixture of heirloom varieties is nice).Instead of the parsley, use chopped fresh basil or mint, or 1/4 cup chopped fresh chives, chervil, dill, or about a tablespoon of fresh thyme leaves.

tiramisu-cupcake-recipe-lezzet.name: Tiramisu Cupcake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup of espresso or granule coffee
Instead of butter, you can use a mixture of margarine or light olive oil + butter; these changes the texture and aroma of the cake into light.
Instead of milk you can get a milder alternative using badam milk, soy milk or oat milk.
You can prepare a more nutritious and differently flavored cake by changing one part with full wheat flour or almond flour.
If you want to reduce the eggs or to remove the can be used instead of eggs chia seeds come or apple porridge.
Instead of Mascarpone you can use cheese or cream cheese; consistency and flavor vary slightly but protects the structure of cream.
Instead of espresso, you can catch different flavors of coffee or filter coffee or adding.
You can use light cream or herbal cream if you want to reduce the cream and a lighter taste.
Instead of Kakao, you can get different taste profiles by spreading the bitter chocolate rendesi or cinnamon
Make presentation more accessible to superficial, hazelnuts or cocoa cookies.

instructions: 1. Take a Steak of butter and powder sugar at room temperature, up to the drink of cream rub.
2. From the whites of the eggs to the snow in a separate container to the veccedil; rub.
3. Cottage yogurt, milk and 1 min of water add and mix.
4. Add flour, baking powder and vanilla and get a smooth dough.
5. Carefully fold the egg whites into the dough with spatula, wrinkled st without spinning.
6. Share the dough evenly on muffin molds.
7. From 170°C to 18–20 minutes,cucleançcook until you are.
8. From the oven to the cake cool.
9. &ccedil until the egg yolks come to the cream consistency with powder sugar.
10. Add Mascarpone’ and get a homogeneous mixture.
11. 11. 11. 11. Add to the cream and espresso/liquid water and mix it into light.
12. Fill in the middle of cold cakes with light-and-gray;e game and tiramisu filling.
12. August Ü sued by spreading to the car.
14 July After a little rest in the refrigerator, serve.

toasted-marshmallow-cake.name: Toasted Marshmallow Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven's broiler and place an oven rack a few inches below it. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and lightly grease the parchment.
Spread out mini marshmallows on the baking sheet in an even layer, and put under the broiler until browned and toasted, about 30 seconds. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C) and place an oven rack in the middle of the oven. Line a 9-inch round cake pan with parchment paper and lightly grease it.
Whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl.

Cream together toasted mini marshmallows, butter, oil, sugar, and marshmallow crème in a large bowl with an electric mixer until thoroughly incorporated and smooth, 2 to 3 minutes. Beat in egg whites, 1 at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in vanilla and almond extracts. Stir in half of the flour mixture until just combined. Mix in buttermilk until just combined. Stir in remaining flour mixture until just combined.
Pour batter into the prepared cake pan, and spread into an even layer.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top springs back lightly when touched, 35 to 40 minutes. Allow cake to cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

toasted-shrimp-soup-kitchen-robot-telecu.name: Toasted Shrimp Soup (kitchen Robot)
toasted-shrimp-soup-kitchen-robot-telecu.original_name: Açorda de camarão tostada (robot de cozinha)
instructions: Peel the shrimp raw and reserve the shells. Cut the bread into thin slices and put them on a tray.

Peel the onion and garlic teeth and pick them out. Light a pot with the butter, add the garlic and the onion and stir it until it is golden. Wash and fix the tomato, pinch it and add it to the pot, along with the shrimp shells, stir well and let it saute. Finally add 3 cups of water. Season with salt and let it stay about half an hour in mild heat.

Go through the bird pass, add the shrimp, take it back to the fire and let it boil for 3 minutes. Retrieve the salt and season with spicy to taste. Water the bread with this broth, open the eggs and lay them on the açorda. Take it to the preheated oven at 180oC until it toasts a little. Sprinkle with chopped coriander and serve.

tom-kha-gai-chicken-coconut-soup.name: Tom Kha Gai (chicken Coconut Soup)

ingredients.item: Makrut (thai) lime leaves or 1 tbsp. lime zest and  0.25 cup lime juice

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1” pieces
oyster, or maitake mushrooms, stemmed, caps cut into bite-size pieces
such as nam pla or nuoc nam
cilantro leaves with tender stems, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Using the back of a knife, lightly smash lemongrass and ginger; cut lemongrass into 4” pieces. Bring lemongrass, ginger, lime leaves, and broth to a boil in a large saucepan. Reduce heat and simmer until flavors are melded, 8–10 minutes. Strain broth into clean saucepan; discard solids.

Add chicken and return to a boil. Reduce heat, add mushrooms, and simmer, skimming occasionally, until chicken is cooked through and mushrooms are soft, 20–25 minutes. Mix in coconut milk, fish sauce, and sugar.
Divide soup among bowls. Serve with chili oil, cilantro, and lime wedges.

tomato-chicken-with-herbs-comedera.name: Tomato Chicken With Herbs

ingredients.item: Varias ramitas de cilantro y perejil frescos

instructions: Soak the onion into a deep pot till it starts to light up. Save her apart.
In the same pot, with a little more oil adds the pieces of chicken and let them cook up and seal them up well throughout (turn them).
It incorporates sodith onions, guindilla and 3 tomatoes previously peeled and cut rustically, that's to say, regardless of whether they are jolian, medium notebooks or anything.
After 5 minutes of cooking, add well small minced herbs.
Let's cook for a while. If necessary, add half a cup of water. Check the salt and pepper for more.
Baja el fuego y tapa. Revuelve de vez en cuando.
That's about 30 minutes from now.
Sirve con arroz blanco o con patatas horneadas.

tomato-beet-soup.name: Tomato-beet Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Puree tomatoes, beets, tomato paste, and 1/2 cup beef stock together in a blender until smooth.
Pour tomato mixture into a saucepan with the remaining beef stock. Stir sugar, dill, hot pepper sauce, salt, and pepper into the tomato mixture.
Bring the soup to a simmer, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook until the flavors meld, about 30 minutes.

tommys-blue-cheese-coleslaw-with-bacon-a.name: Tommy's Blue Cheese Coleslaw (with Bacon And Grapes)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine sour cream, mayonnaise, apple cider vinegar, mustard, and sugar in a bowl; stir until evenly mixed. Fold in blue cheese crumbles; mix in cabbage and carrot mix and grapes. Season with salt and pepper. Top with chopped bacon.
Refrigerate coleslaw until sticky and wet, 8 hours or overnight.

tortas-de-salchicha-grilled-hot-dog-tort.name: Tortas De Salchicha (grilled Hot Dog Tortas)

ingredients.prep: preferably teleras, Portuguese, kaiser, or ciabatta, split

ingredients.item: Scant 1/4 cup mexican crema or crème fraîche

instructions: Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Spread the butter evenly over the cut sides of the rolls. Cook the rolls, buttered sides down, in the skillet until they are light golden brown and crisp, but still soft in the middle, a minute or two.

Spread a layer of beans (a tablespoon or two) over the bottom half of each roll, then put a slice of cheese on the roll bottoms. Spread the crema and mustard over the roll tops and add the remaining cheese.

Cook the hot dogs, cut side down, in the same pan until they're golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Set the bun bottoms, cheese side down, on top of the hot dogs. Cook for a minute more, so the cheese has a chance to melt.

Flip the bun bottoms and the hot dogs together onto a cutting board. Top with SLICED CANNED PICKLED JALAPEÑOS, THINLY SLICED WHITE ONIONS, slices of RIPE MEXICAN HASS AVOCADO, and a pinch of salt. Cover with the roll tops and press firmly but gently.

traditional-eggnog.name: Traditional Eggnog
instructions: Beat eggs with an electric mixer on medium speed until very frothy, 2 to 3 minutes.
Gradually beat in sugar, vanilla extract, and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg.
Stir in cream, milk, brandy, and rum.
Cover and chill before serving. Sprinkle individual servings with remaining nutmeg.

traditional-holy-week-torrijas-the-recip.name: Traditional Holy Week Torrijas (the Recipe)
traditional-holy-week-torrijas-the-recip.original_name: Torrijas tradicionales de Semana Santa (la MEJOR receta)

ingredients.item: 1 bar of bread from the previous day or brioche bread

instructions: Cortamos el pan en rodajas que disponemos en una fuente.
We put milk with cinnamon branch, 4 tablespoons of sugar and the skin of a lemon.
Cuando rompa a hervir retiramos del fuego y vertemos sobre el pan. Lo dejamos unos minutos para que el pan absorba toda la leche y se empape bien.
We put our balls in a bowl. We put a frying pan with virgin olive oil in the fire. When the oil's hot we put the bread through the egg.
We fry in the oil till they're golden. We get and put onto a plate with cooking paper to absorb the excess oil.
Then, still hot, we bounce into a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.

traditional-xerotigana-argiro.name: Traditional Xerotigana
instructions: Make a delicate dough with eggs.
In a bowl, add the eggs, vanillas, ouzo, oil and salt.
We hit them with the mixer coming together.
Add the flour about 1.5 to 2 cups gradually.
We knead until the dough is relatively tight and firm but it is unstuck and made.
Cover and allow to rest for 30 minutes.
We take pieces of dough the size of a nut.
Open very thin leaf on either the pasta machine or hand by sprinkle with some flour.
Touch the opened minute on a clean tablecloth.
After we open it all to long thin pieces, let's go frying.

tropical-island-fruit-salad.name: Tropical Island Fruit Salad

ingredients.prep: pitted, and cut into small cubes
seeded, peeled, and cut into 1/2-inch cubes

instructions: Toss pineapple, mangos, papayas, and bananas together in a large bowl.

tteokbokki-traditional-korean-recipe-peq.name: Tteokbokki (traditional Korean Recipe)

ingredients.item: 600 ml de caldo suave (de verduras o de pollo, el que uses habitualmente)
1 cucharada de gochujang (pasta de chile coreano)
2 cucharaditas de gochugaru (copos de chile coreano)
2 cebolletas (la parte verde y la blanca)

instructions: Primero pon a remojar los 400 g de tteok si vienen refrigerados o un poco duros; con diez minutos en agua caliente es suficiente.
Meanwhile, it heats an oil chorrit into a large frying pan and adds the minced garlic tooth with the white part of both onions. Let them get soft without them getting golden.
To make tteokbokki salsa, in a bowl mix 600 ml of broth, 1 tablespoon of gochujang, 2 tablespoons of gochumaru, 1 tablespoon of sugar and 2 tablespoons of soya salsa.
Fold this mixture into the frying pan and let it start to boil gently so that the salsa will integrate and weigh a little.

Drain them and add them to the frying pan. It removes so that they are well impregnated and let them cook between 8 and 10 minutes, stirring from time to time, and you will see how the salsa goes down and thick around the cylinders that have to be tender but with its typical elasticity.

When the tteok are at its point, add the green part of the fine cut onions and, if you care about them, add the baked eggs that have been stuffed and have some flavour. Kill the fire and leave to stand for two minutes. Serves hot and sprinks some sesame seeds just before bringing the plate to the table.

tufahija-lezzet.name: Tufahija
instructions: 1. The shells of apples and cut these shells into one edge.
2. Details interior play carefully.
3. Boil the pot by taking water, sugar, lemon juice and apple shells.
4. When water starts to boil interior add apples and sprinkle apples for 5-10 minutes.
5. Hands in 30 minutes.
6. Wait on aside in the pot.
7. Olive oil and milkmix in bowl.
8. Melt the butter and mix it by adding sugar to the veuuml.
9. Milky add butterkinine and roast 2 minutes.
10. Drink mortar with fer fill in the veuuml; and go to the car.
11. 11. When it comes to temperature, remove it to the refrigerator and relax for 1 hour.
12. After serving Tufahija dessert first squeeze the cream and sprinkle the nuts.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

tuna-balls-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Balls Recipe
tuna-balls-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Receita fácil de Bolinhas de atum
instructions: Descasque, lave e pique bem a cebola. Leve-a ao lume num tacho com azeite. Deixe alourar e retire a cebola do lume.
Drain the bread in milk and let it soften. Drain well with your hands and add to the previous preparation. Add an egg, run-down tuna, a few drops of lemon, salt, pepper and chopped parsley.
Shake well and add the potato flakes gradually until you can shape well. Make small balls with the paste, pass them by egg beaten and then by grated bread.
Take a frying pan to the fire with oil and let it warm. Fry the balls and dry them on absorbent paper. Serve the hot or cold tuna balls.

tuna-pie-platter-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Pie Platter
instructions: Wash the potatoes, cut them in half and cook them in salt water. After they're cooked, pour them out, let them go down and remove their skins. Pass them through the veal pass, add the milk, butter, nutmeg, salt and pepper and mix well. Reserve.

In a pot, heat the olive oil, add the onion and finely chopped garlic teeth and let it saute, stirring from time to time. Add the tomato, the pepper, clean and cut into strips, and the shrimp kernel and let it saute some more. Remove from the fire, add chopped parsley to taste and the tuna drained and undone, retrieve the seasonings and book.

Have a layer of puree on a board, spread over the previous filling and cover with the remaining puree. Brush with the yolk mixed with the milk and take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, until golden. Serve hot.

turkey-leg-with-drunken-pears-teleculina.name: Turkey Leg With Drunken Pears
turkey-leg-with-drunken-pears-teleculina.original_name: Perna de peru com peras bêbedas

ingredients.item: 100 g de couve para caldo verde

instructions: Prepare the turkey: peel and pinch the garlic teeth, lay in a bowl and add the chopped chili, lemon juice, laurel, parsley, white wine, salt and pepper. Involve everything very well, water the turkey with this seasoning and let marinate for a while.
Then put the meat on a tray, spread over the butter and put it in the oven, preheated at 170°C, for about 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, prepare the migas: cut the bread into pieces. Light a pot with the oil and crushed garlic, add the bread and let it shine a little. Add the bean fritter, well drained, and wrap. Add the cabbage, season with salt and pepper and let cook for 5 minutes.

Separately prepare pears: peel them, put them in a pot, add sugar, cinnamon stick and lemon peels. Add the port wine and water, take it to the fire and let cook, in mild heat, until cooked. Serve the turkey leg sliced with migas and drunk pears.

turkish-chicken-kebabs.name: Turkish Chicken Kebabs
instructions: Whisk yogurt, garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, ketchup, red pepper flakes, salt, cumin, black pepper, paprika, and cinnamon together in a large bowl.
Place chicken thigh halves into the yogurt marinade and coat them thoroughly on all sides. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate, 2 to 8 hours.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Using 2 skewers for each kebab, thread half of the chicken thighs onto each pair of skewers making a fairly thick 'log' shape.

Place kebabs on the preheated grill. Do not try to turn them until they begin to unstick from the grill, 3 or 4 minutes. Turn kebabs and grill the other side for 3 to 4 minutes. Continue cooking and turning until chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 6 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

turmeric-iced-coffee-latte.name: Turmeric Iced Coffee Latte
instructions: Pour coconut milk, vanilla extract, and 1 packet stevia powder into a glass and stir to combine. Fill glass with ice cubes.

Combine water, instant coffee granules, 1 packet stevia powder, turmeric, ginger and cinnamon in a microwave-safe glass; stir to mix. Microwave for 30 seconds. Stir. Continue microwaving at 15-second intervals until hot and foamy. Carefully pour over the iced coconut milk.

tuscan-turkey-soupy-noodles.name: Tuscan Turkey Soupy Noodles

ingredients.item: Carcass from a 12- to 14-pound roast turkey
ingredients.prep: including skin, or 6 pound turkey wings
greens reserved and white and pale green parts washed (see Cooking Tips) and chopped

ingredients.item: Dried egg pasta squares (such as cipriani brand tagliardi)
ingredients.prep: or dried no-boil egg lasagne sheets (such as Barilla)

instructions: Break down carcass into smaller pieces. Simmer carcass, water, reserved leek greens, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a 7- to 10-quart heavy pot, uncovered, skimming froth, 3 hours.
Discard large bones with a slotted spoon or tongs, then strain stock through a large sieve into a large bowl (discard solids).
If stock measures less than 10 cups, add water. If it measures more, boil until reduced.

If using stock right away, let stand until fat rises to top, 1 to 2 minutes, then skim off and discard fat. If not, chill (covered once cool) before removing fat. (It will be easier to remove when cool or cold.)

Cook garlic in oil in cleaned pot over medium heat, stirring, until pale golden, about 1 minute. Add onion and 1/4 teaspoon salt and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden, 5 to 8 minutes. Stir in chopped leeks and rosemary and cook, covered, stirring occasionally, until leeks are softened, about 5 minutes. Add carrots, celery, and 1/4 teaspoon salt and cook, stirring occasionally, 3 minutes. Stir in tomatoes and stock and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Stir in pasta and briskly simmer soup, stirring occasionally, until pasta is al dente. Add spinach and stir until wilted.

two-crust-potato-pie.name: Two-crust Potato Pie

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Pastry for a 9 inch double crust pie

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain; steam dry for 1 to 2 minutes.
Add ¼ cup butter, ¼ cup milk, salt, and black pepper to potatoes; mash until medium-stiff. Stir in cheese.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Fit bottom (1) crust in a 9-inch pie plate; fill with potato mixture. Place top (remaining 1) crust on filling, fold crust edges together, and crimp with a fork to seal.
Combine 2 teaspoons melted butter and 2 teaspoons milk in a small bowl; brush over crust. Cut several vent holes in top crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden brown, about 45 minutes; if edges getting too brown, cover with aluminum foil.
